item.title: About page
item.intent: /about must tell the narrative arc from cloud infrastructure to AI infrastructure, state current projects, declare advisory availability, and include contact details — all on one screen.
steps: Write narrative arc section (cloud infra → AI infra)
List current projects with brief descriptions
Add availability statement and contact details
Add colophon describing how the site is built
acceptanceCriteria: Page includes contact information and availability statement
